_comment: Maps files in docs/img/ to Modrinth gallery metadata. Every image in docs/img/ is uploaded; an entry here is optional and only adds a title/description/featured flag/ordering. Drop in an image, optionally add an entry, then deploy. See .github/workflows/upload_gallery.yml.

skin-example.png.title: Skin Example
skin-example.png.description: A skin grabbed from a username and applied to a fake player.

ai-submenu.png.title: AI Sub-menu
ai-submenu.png.description: Bond a fake, pick a job, hand out markers and start work.

management-gui.png.title: Management GUI
management-gui.png.description: Skin, pose and the AI / SL / TG controls.

miner-quarry.png.title: Miner Job
miner-quarry.png.description: A fake player clearing a quarry on the Miner job.

lumberjack.png.title: Lumberjack Job
lumberjack.png.description: A fake player after felling a tree on the Lumberjack job.
